message:
feat: Add dynamic WASM variant selection for C extension packages

Instead of hardcoding numpy, introduce a general variant system that
selects the right python.wasm binary at deploy time based on project
dependencies.

- Add lib/variants.json: registry mapping packages to WASM variants
  (base, numpy, future: scipy, pandas, etc.)
- Add cli/lib/variants.js: shared variant resolution logic
  - parseDeps() reads pyproject.toml dependencies
  - resolveVariant() maps deps to smallest covering variant
  - applyVariant() copies the right binary to python.wasm at deploy
  - checkPackage() identifies C extension packages
- Update cli/commands/deploy.js: auto-select variant before bundling,
  copy extension-site-packages.zip for variants that need Python files
- Update cli/commands/add.js: warn when adding C extension packages,
  block unsupported extensions (scipy, etc.) with clear error
- Update cli/commands/install.js: skip pip download for C extension
  packages (provided by WASM variant, not wheels)
- Update worker.ts and python-do.ts: mount extension-site-packages.zip
  on PYTHONPATH when present (loaded via conditional import)
- Update pymode init template to show extension package usage

files.patch:
@@ -41,6 +41,10 @@ export async function init(args) {
     `[project]
 name = "${name}"
 version = "0.1.0"
+# dependencies = [
+#     "requests",    # pure-Python packages work out of the box
+#     "numpy",       # C extensions auto-select the right WASM variant
+# ]
 
 [tool.pymode]
 main = "src/entry.py"

@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+{
+  "_comment": "WASM variant registry. Maps C extension packages to pre-built python.wasm variants.",
+  "variants": {
+    "base": {
+      "description": "CPython 3.13 — no C extensions",
+      "wasm": "python.wasm",
+      "sitePackages": null,
+      "extensions": [],
+      "size": "5.6MB"
+    },
+    "numpy": {
+      "description": "CPython 3.13 + numpy 2.4.2 (_multiarray_umath statically linked)",
+      "wasm": "python-numpy.wasm",
+      "sitePackages": "numpy-site-packages.zip",
+      "extensions": ["numpy"],
+      "size": "8.3MB"
+    }
+  },
+  "extensionPackages": {
+    "numpy": "numpy",
+    "pandas": "numpy",
+    "scipy": null,
+    "sklearn": null,
+    "scikit-learn": null,
+    "pillow": null,
+    "PIL": null,
+    "lxml": null,
+    "cryptography": null,
+    "cffi": null,
+    "pyyaml": null,
+    "msgpack": null,
+    "orjson": null,
+    "ujson": null,
+    "markupsafe": null,
+    "pydantic-core": null
+  }
+}
